description: Call GET /api/tiktok/get-user-post/v1 for TikTok User Published Posts through JustOneAPI with secUid.

operations.description: Get TikTok user Published Posts data, including video ID, description, and publish time, for user activity analysis and posting frequency tracking, influencer performance evaluation, and content trend monitoring for specific creators.

parameters.description: The unique security ID of the TikTok user (e.g., MS4wLjABAAAAonP2...).
parameters.name: secUid

parameters.description: Pagination cursor. Use '0' for the first page, then use the 'cursor' value returned in the previous response.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description:
Sorting criteria for the user's posts.

Available Values:
- `_0`: Default (Mixed)
- `_1`: Highest Liked
- `_2`: Latest Published
parameters.name: sort
